case_title: RENEE HODGES VS. NATIONAL CAB COMPANY, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON MAY-26-2026.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT NATIONAL CAB COMPANY, INC. TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT HODGES, RENEE DEFENSE COUNSEL HAVING PROFFERED A LETTER DATED MARCH 7, 2011 FROM PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT ADVISING THAT SHE NO LONGER WISHES TO PURSUE THIS CLAIM, JUDGMENT IS ENTERED FOR DEFENDANT/APPELLANT NATIONAL CAB COMPANY, INC. ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF MAY-01-2012
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HODGES, RENEE AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL CAB COMPANY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT NATIONAL CAB COMPANY, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HODGES, RENEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL CAB COMPANY, INC. $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,585.00, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS CASE WAS INFLUENCED BY THE EXTENSIVE DIANOGSTIC COSTS INCURRED. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-10-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:58am
Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, National Cab Co. appears through Counsel Paul Van Dyke . Respondent, Renee Hodges, does not appear. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Grotch.

Appellant provides to the Judge a letter from respondent indicating she is no longer pursuing the claim. This document is retained but not marked.

10:01am
Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-11-2011 Judgment Entered
